category_sources: source_facts.description says MySQL logical backup tool; official repo https://github.com/mydumper/mydumper describes MyDumper as a MySQL Logical Backup Tool.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/mydumper/mydumper uses MyDumper in the README and repository description.
docs_sources: Official repository README links official documentation; dedicated documentation is hosted at https://mydumper.github.io/mydumper/docs/html/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/mydumper/mydumper, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repo README identify MyDumper/MyLoader as MySQL logical backup and restore tools with multithreading.
